# Pull Request

## What does this PR do?
<!-- Briefly describe what you're adding or changing -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Add new server
- [ ] Fix broken link / outdated entry
- [ ] Improve description
- [ ] Add new category
- [ ] Other

## Checklist (for new server additions)
- [ ] I've personally tested this server
- [ ] It has a README with installation instructions
- [ ] Last commit is within 6 months (or officially supported)
- [ ] Entry follows the format in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Added in alphabetical order within its category
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing entry
